message:
feat(goose): add Goose connector with SQLite + JSONL support

Implements a full connector for Block's Goose coding agent:

- SQLite scanning (v1.20+): reads sessions.db with proper schema
  mapping, tool call extraction from content_json, incremental
  scanning via updated_at timestamps
- Legacy JSONL scanning: parses .jsonl session files for older
  Goose versions
- Corrected detection paths: ~/.local/share/goose/sessions/ (XDG
  default) instead of ~/.goose/sessions/ (legacy-only)
- GOOSE_PATH_ROOT env var override support
- Unique synthetic source_path per session (db_path/encoded_id)
  to support cass export round-trip
- 28 unit tests covering content parsing, timestamp normalization,
  tool extraction, SQLite and JSONL parsing, and since-filter

Closes #4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -57,7 +57,7 @@ cursor = ["connectors", "dep:rusqlite", "dep:urlencoding"]
 # OpenCode: SQLite database access for v1.2+ opencode.db
 opencode = ["connectors", "dep:rusqlite", "dep:urlencoding"]
 # Goose: SQLite database access for Goose sessions.db
-goose = ["connectors", "dep:rusqlite"]
+goose = ["connectors", "dep:rusqlite", "dep:urlencoding"]
 # Crush: SQLite database access for Charm's Crush agent (uses frankensqlite)
 crush = ["connectors", "dep:frankensqlite"]
 # All connectors enabled
